generation_history.focus: Phase-019-blocking depth pass (3-wave parallel); 6 iter-030 deferrals resolved in iter 040

resolved_questions_list.question: Routing authority
resolved_questions_list.resolution: contentRouter with 3-tier classifier (rule → embedding → LLM), 8 content categories, confidence tiers, refuse-to-route at <0.5

resolved_questions_list.question: Anchor-scoped write semantics
resolved_questions_list.resolution: 5 merge modes (append-paragraph, insert-adr, append-table-row, update-in-place, append-section) inside per-spec-folder mutex envelope

resolved_questions_list.question: Thin continuity layer shape
resolved_questions_list.resolution: _memory.continuity YAML sub-block in spec doc frontmatter, ~10-15 fields, <2KB per block

resolved_questions_list.question: Feature retargeting per advanced capability
resolved_questions_list.resolution: All 13 features retarget without deletion; 6 XS, 4 S, 3 M effort; biggest schema change is 2 new columns on causal_edges

resolved_questions_list.question: Resume journey end-to-end
resolved_questions_list.resolution: 4x faster fast path bypassing SQL; reads handover.md + _memory.continuity; actionable recovery package in <300ms

resolved_questions_list.question: /memory:save user flow
resolved_questions_list.resolution: Auto mode + interactive mode + dry-run; routing transparency shows targets before write; user override via --route-as

resolved_questions_list.question: Validation contract
resolved_questions_list.resolution: New spec-doc-structure validator + FRONTMATTER_MEMORY_BLOCK rule + MERGE_LEGALITY + POST_SAVE_FINGERPRINT verification

resolved_questions_list.question: Migration of existing corpus
resolved_questions_list.resolution: M4 bounded archive with FSRS decay; 1-week implementation; 180-day observation window with data-driven permanence decision

resolved_questions_list.question: Trust and safety
resolved_questions_list.resolution: Per-spec-folder mutex + mtime external-edit detection + post-save fingerprint verification + 30 failure modes mapped + dashboard metrics

key_findings.title: 4 new components needed: contentRouter, anchorMergeOperation, thinContinuityRecord, resumeLadder
Only 2 of 16 save pipeline stages need full rewrite; 8 transfer as-is
8 content categories cover all memory content types
3-tier classifier (rule → embedding → LLM) handles 80/15/5 split
5 merge modes (append-paragraph, insert-adr, append-table-row, update-in-place, append-section)
Atomic envelope reuses existing withSpecFolderLock at memory-save.ts:1569
Option M-B (embedded YAML _memory sub-block) wins over sidecar and separate file
_memory.continuity lives in frontmatter; not a separate storage primitive
All 13 advanced features retarget without deletion
Only 2 schema changes needed: is_archived column + causal_edges anchor columns
Resume latency drops 4x (1200ms → 300ms) on happy path
Resume output drops 3x (10KB → 3KB) with higher signal
Routing transparency is the core UX win for /memory:save
Per-spec-folder mutex is the right concurrency granularity
Mtime external-edit detection is a new safety net (current system lacks it)
M4 migration is 1 week of code + 180-day observation window
~5 root packets with no canonical docs are a Gate A prerequisite blocker
30 failure modes mapped with recovery paths
Post-save fingerprint verification catches silent failures
End-to-end journey composes cleanly with 5 weak links, none blocking
~250 tests + 10 manual playbooks = ~50 M-eq test effort (12% of total)
6-gate rollout plan with explicit pass criteria per gate
10-item risk register; top risks: schema corruption, classifier misroute, latency regression
Composite convergence 0.95 — higher than phase 017 (0.92)
